stdout:
{
  "bundle_path": "$TMP/unpacked/bundle.json",
  "package_manifest": {
    "archive_version": "spkg/v0",
    "asset_kind": "session",
    "bundle_id": "bundle-codex-session",
    "source_tool": "codex",
    "source_session_id": "codex-session",
    "files": [
      "bundle.json",
      "spkg-manifest.json"
    ]
  },
  "export_manifest": {
    "asset_kind": "session",
    "bundle_id": "bundle-codex-session",
    "source_tool": "codex",
    "source_session_id": "codex-session",
    "target_tool": "claude",
    "output_dir": "$TMP/unpacked",
    "files": [
      "CLAUDE.sessionport.md",
      "MEMORY_NOTE.md",
      "STARTER_PROMPT.md",
      "manifest.json"
    ],
    "partial_fields": [
      "raw_transcript",
      "resume_hints",
      "settings_snapshot",
      "token_stats",
      "tool_events",
      "tool_outputs",
      "touched_files"
    ],
    "unsupported_fields": [
      "hidden_reasoning",
      "native_hook_plugin_state",
      "vendor_specific_options"
    ],
    "redacted_fields": [
      "settings.auth_token",
      "settings.experimental"
    ],
    "warnings": [
      "2 settings keys remain redacted in portability output.",
      "Claude export will convert portable context into CLAUDE.md supplements and plain memory notes.",
      "Source-native resume hints are carried as plain notes only and do not recreate native resume state."
    ]
  }
}
